title: rubus × polyanthoides
intro: Rubus × polyanthoides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry rose, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, which is a group of thorny shrubs that produce edible fruits. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × polyanthoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help with wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
